subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto my Beloved, Who, through His blessed Word "Thou seest no imperfection in the creation of the Most Merciful," hath gathered together the peoples of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی را که بکلمه مبارکه لاتری فی خلق الرحمن من تفاوت اهل عالم را جمع نمود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the power of words; of speech, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @knowledge; recognition of God
